description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CTest (Windows) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents and use a matrix strategy to build on different Windows environments (2019 and 2022) with various architectures (amd64, amd64_x86, amd64_arm64) and build types (x64-Debug, x64-Release, etc.). In each job, check out the repository, clone a test repository, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure CMake, and build the project.
